title: Jotform Dates to Monday Timeline Integration
excerpt:
Hello Everyone! 
I am trying to transfer a date range from a Jotform submission to Monday’s timeline column. Does anyone know if this is possible?

posts.author: JaredJLY (Jared Young)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Everyone!

I am trying to transfer a date range from a Jotform submission to Monday’s timeline column. Does anyone know if this is possible?

posts.author: hellotimi (David Kalu (Formula Pro - Use formula column results in automations!))
posts.cookedHtml:
@JaredJLY
I notice Jotform doesn’t support timeline columns. Have you tried using a tool like make.com as a workaround where you map jotform submitted fields to the monday.com timeline column.

posts.author: malikg1122 (Malik Sohail)
posts.cookedHtml: The “Jotform Dates to Monday Timeline Integration” allows you to sync date fields from Jotform forms with the timeline feature in Monday.com. This integration helps automatically update timelines in Monday.com based on the data submitted through Jotform, streamlining project management and ensuring accurate scheduling.

posts.author: lisa52smith (Lisa Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Jared Young:

Hello Everyone!

I am trying to transfer a date range from a Jotform submission to Monday’s timeline column. Does anyone know if this is possible Culver’s official survey website?

Yes, it is possible to transfer a date range from a Jotform submission to Monday’s timeline column, but it requires some setup. You can use Integromat (now Make) to create a connection between Jotform and Monday com. Here’s a general approach:

  1. Create a New Integration: Set up a new integration in Integromat to connect Jotform and Monday com.
  2. Map Fields: Map the date fields from your Jotform submission to the corresponding fields in Monday com.
  3. Create a Timeline: Use the “Start + End = Timeline” app from the Monday com marketplace to convert the date range into a timeline.

posts.author: koko03_30 (Konstantin Botev)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Jared,

If you are looking for a way to automate the timeline, you can check out this app:

auth.monday.com

Timeline manipulator - monday.com Marketplace

Automations trigger timeline updates when column values change.

Best regards,
Konstantin
